trigger_negs.text: You look like someone who asks for the manager before the problem even starts.
You look like someone who reads the rules just so you can enforce them.
You seem like the kind of person who enjoys correcting strangers.
You look like someone who brings policies into casual conversations.
You seem like someone who says 'technically…' a lot.
You look like someone who enjoys being offended on behalf of others.
You seem like the kind of person who audits jokes.
You look like someone who pauses movies to explain why something is problematic.
You seem like someone who reads comment sections for sport.
You look like someone who enjoys correcting people's tone.
You seem like someone who reports things instead of ignoring them.
You look like someone who reads terms and conditions for fun.
You seem like someone who starts emails with 'per policy.'
You look like someone who enjoys escalating things.
You seem like someone who collects small victories in arguments.
You look like someone who fact-checks casual conversation.
You seem like someone who enjoys pointing out technicalities.
You look like someone who says 'actually…' a lot.
You seem like someone who enjoys being the referee.
You look like someone who enforces unwritten rules.
You seem like someone who brings structure into chaos.
You look like someone who keeps mental score.
You seem like someone who remembers exactly what people said.
You look like someone who debates strangers online.
You seem like someone who writes long comments.
You look like someone who enjoys correcting headlines.
You seem like someone who argues with algorithms.
You look like someone who explains jokes.
You seem like someone who polices sarcasm.
You look like someone who audits conversations.
You seem like someone who enjoys pointing out contradictions.
You look like someone who enjoys the debate more than the topic.
You seem like someone who enjoys being technically correct.
You look like someone who says 'that's not the point.'
You seem like someone who enjoys correcting phrasing.
You look like someone who escalates things politely.
You seem like someone who enjoys the complaint form.
You look like someone who writes reviews longer than the experience.
You seem like someone who enjoys reporting things.
You look like someone who enjoys moderating conversations.
